description: 水墨雅韵 - 墨黑 + 朱砂红,衬线字体,克制雅致的现代宋体,适合观点 / 人文 / 深度长文

styles.body: font-family: 'Noto Serif SC', 'Source Han Serif SC', 'Songti SC', 'STSong', 'PingFang SC', serif; font-size: 16px; color: #1d1a17; line-height: 1.95; letter-spacing: 0.8px; word-spacing: 2px; padding: 20px 16px; background: #fafaf7;
styles.h1: font-size: 24px; font-weight: 700; color: #1a1a1a; text-align: center; margin: 40px 0 28px; padding: 0 0 18px 0; letter-spacing: 4px; line-height: 1.4; border-bottom: 2px solid #1a1a1a;
styles.h2: font-size: 19px; font-weight: 700; color: #1a1a1a; margin: 40px 0 20px; padding: 4px 0 10px 0; border-bottom: 1px solid #1a1a1a; line-height: 1.55; letter-spacing: 1.5px;
styles.h3: font-size: 16px; font-weight: 700; color: #6a2828; margin: 30px 0 14px; padding: 0 0 0 12px; border-left: 3px solid #6a2828; letter-spacing: 1px;
styles.p: margin: 18px 0; text-indent: 0; text-align: justify; color: #1d1a17; line-height: 2.0;
styles.blockquote: margin: 28px 0; padding: 20px 24px; background: #f2efe8; border-left: 4px solid #6a2828; color: #3a3330; font-size: 15px; border-radius: 0; line-height: 2.0; font-style: italic; letter-spacing: 0.6px;
styles.img: max-width: 100%; height: auto; border-radius: 2px; margin: 28px auto; display: block; box-shadow: 0 4px 18px rgba(26,26,26,0.08); border: 1px solid #e8e4d9;
styles.code_inline: background: #f2efe8; color: #6a2828; padding: 2px 8px; border-radius: 2px; font-size: 13.5px; font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', 'Menlo', 'Consolas', monospace; border: 1px solid #e0dacc;
styles.code_block: background: #1a1a1a; color: #f2efe8; padding: 16px 18px; border-radius: 2px; font-size: 12.5px; line-height: 1.65; font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', 'Menlo', 'Consolas', monospace; overflow-x: auto; white-space: pre; margin: 26px 0; border: none; -webkit-overflow-scrolling: touch; -moz-tab-size: 2; tab-size: 2; font-variant-ligatures: none; -webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased;
styles.ol: margin: 20px 0; padding-left: 0; list-style: none; counter-reset: list;
styles.li_bullet: color: #6a2828; font-weight: 700; font-size: 13px; display: inline-block; min-width: 16px; margin-right: 8px; text-align: left;
styles.li_number: color: #6a2828; font-weight: 700; font-size: 14px; min-width: 22px; display: inline-block; margin-right: 10px;
styles.hr: border: none; height: 1px; background: #1a1a1a; margin: 42px 0; opacity: 0.25;
styles.a: color: #6a2828; text-decoration: none; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(106,40,40,0.5);
styles.table: width: 100%; border-collapse: collapse; margin: 26px 0; font-size: 14.5px; border-top: 2px solid #1a1a1a; border-bottom: 2px solid #1a1a1a; table-layout: fixed; word-break: break-word;
styles.th: background: transparent; color: #1a1a1a; padding: 10px 8px; text-align: left; font-weight: 700; font-size: 12.5px; border-bottom: 1px solid #1a1a1a; letter-spacing: 1px; word-break: break-word; line-height: 1.5;
styles.td: padding: 10px 8px; border-bottom: 1px solid #e8e4d9; color: #1d1a17; font-size: 13px; word-break: break-word; line-height: 1.55;
styles.caption: font-size: 13px; color: #8a7968; text-align: center; margin-top: 12px; letter-spacing: 1px; font-style: italic;
styles.section_divider: text-align: center; color: #1a1a1a; letter-spacing: 18px; font-size: 14px; margin: 42px 0; user-select: none; opacity: 0.45;

list_style.label: A · 墨色圆圈
list_style.num_container: display: inline-block; color: #1a1a1a; font-weight: 700; font-size: 17px; margin-right: 8px; line-height: 1; vertical-align: -1px; font-family: 'Georgia','Times New Roman',serif;
list_style.bullet_container: display: inline-block; color: #b8362a; font-size: 13px; margin-right: 10px; font-weight: 700;
